subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-11-10 in Bahji
subcodes.first_line: Man must ever strive to quench the flame, for verily this world is naught but flame - a realm of conflict and contention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انسان باید همیشه شعله را بنشاند.  چون که این عالم همه اش شعله است، عالم نزاع و جدال است.  نزاع میانه
subcodes.subjects: @competition vs. cooperation; the struggle for existence, @contention and conflict, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @love and unity
